html:
Exclusive to:

Salt Crystals are an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are dropped by destroyed or mined Salt Formations found in the Ocean. Salt Crystals are required to craft the Salt Box. Three Salt Crystals can also be ground into two Seasoning Salt spices by Warly using the Portable Grinding Mill.

Salt Crystals can be used on perishable Food items to restore up to 50% of their freshness. If used on a stack of Food, the effect is divided by the size of the stack. However, Salt Crystals cannot be used on cooked food, Crock Pot dishes and plantable items, such as Seeds.

The Gorge

Only during the Event: The Gorge

Salt CrystalsSalt

Salt Crystals were initially introduced in The Gorge event. In this event, in order to receive Salt Crystals, one must install a Salt Rack at a Salt Pond and wait two minutes until it is ready. Once the time is up, Salt Crystals will appear out of the pond and can then be harvested for a Salt Crystal. A Salt Crystal can be ground up with the Mealing Stone, granting the player three Salts.

Salt can be used to extend the freshness of cooked meals while also increasing their value when given to The Gnaw. In addition, three Salts can be traded with the Swamp Pig Elder for a Key.

Trivia

  • Salt Crystals were introduced to the main game in the Salty Dog update.
  • Warly, Wortox, Wormwood, and Wurt, despite not being in Don't Starve Together while the The Gorge event was in the game, have unimplemented quotes for its version of Salt Crystals and Salt.
    • Walter and Wanda are the only Together exclusive characters not to have quotes for the items.
  • Wortox's examination quote is in reference to the popular belief that salt acts a deterrent to supernatural or evil powers.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tinh thể muối là một Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Chúng rơi ra từ các thành tạo muối bị phá hủy hoặc khai thác ở Đại dương. Tinh thể muối cần thiết để chế tạo Hộp Muối. Ba Tinh Thể Muối cũng có thể được Warly nghiền thành hai loại gia vị Muối Nêm bằng Máy Xay Di Động.
